name: sempervirine
mechanism: Gelsemium alkaloids act on the central and peripheral nervous system; gelsemine has demonstrated antinociceptive activity at spinal alpha3 glycine receptors, while toxic alkaloids can cause convulsions and respiratory failure.
summary: Gelsemium alkaloids act on the central and peripheral nervous system; gelsemine has demonstrated antinociceptive activity at spinal alpha3 glycine receptors, while toxic alkaloids can cause convulsions and respiratory failure.
